title: Accessible Star Rating

statement.markdown:
## Accessible Star Rating

Create a rating system, where users can rate a product from 1 to 5 stars. The rating should be indicated by a set of accessible stars. The user should be able to change the rating by clicking on a star. You need to ensure that the selected star will be clearly visible to screen readers and other assistive technologies.

### Requirements

1. The rating system should be accessible for screen readers.
2. The user should be able to change the rating by clicking on a star.
3. The selected star should be clearly visible to screen readers and other assistive technologies.
4. The star rating system should work in different browsers and devices.
5. The rating should persist even when the page is reloaded.
text: Accessible Star Rating

constraints: Use HTML 5 semantic tags for structure.
Use a CSS framework like Tailwind CSS for styling.
Use JavaScript to manipulate the DOM and persist the rating.

starterCode.html: No star selected

gradingCriteria.description: The rating system is accessible for screen readers.
The user can change the rating by clicking on a star.
The selected star is clearly visible to screen readers and other assistive technologies.
The star rating system works in different browsers and devices.
The rating persists even when the page is reloaded.
